content: tfw you realise that a result you've spent half an hour trying to prove is a corollary of a more general result you'd proved before :tada:

Whoops!

Sounds like when I look for explanations of math concepts and wind up reading old issues of This Week's Finds.

I always wind up feeling a little pretentious when writing the phrase "this is a special case of... [result I presented earlier]" but it's vastly outweighed by satisfaction. That is sort of the point of category theory, after all.
